column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for parts of Sarasota County. Download the ABC Action News App for the latest information.
What is this 6 day old post showing up first up?
it's been going on like that for me for weeks, I get a notification like it's a new post, and when I click on it. It's days old
is it just for Denis Phillips? Mine is just for him.

Denis, I love ya but...it's time to acknowledge that this s@@t storm was NOT A TD OR TS. This was tantamount to a full blown hurricane. Cat 1, of course, but. I've lived through Cat 3 hurricanes that blew through here faster than this freak garbage. 2 entire days....???
